title: Sinister Circus
description:
A mod that adds items, equipment and food themed around carnivals! (with an evil twist)

Made for Modfest - Carnival
body:
# Sinister Circus

Sinister Circus is a small mod that adds items, equipment and food themed around carnivals (with an evil twist >:D)

**This mod was made for Modfest - Carnival! Huge thanks to the Modfest team for hosting this whole event! :D**


## Equipment

### Jester Hammer

The Jester Hammer is a powerful hammer that can launch back your enemies a far distance when hit! It also has a chance do give them the "Dizziness" effect, slowing down entities and inverting player's controls.

### Trickster Crossbow

The Trickster Crossbow is a formidible bow that launches a wide spread of arrows when shot. Each arrow also has a chance to be tipped with a negative status effect!


### Jester Armor

The Jester Armor is a stylish armor set that provides you with a speed boost when you're low on health, giving you extra mobility options in battle!
